description: Metrics for the argocd-agent agent component running on workload clusters

targets.expr: process_open_fds{namespace=~"$namespace", agent_name=~"$agent_name", job=~"$job"} / process_max_fds{namespace=~"$namespace", agent_name=~"$agent_name", job=~"$job"} * 100

title: ArgoCD Agent - Agent
